features.title: Web UI
features.description: Implement the Web UI for the Web Collaboration Beta (F2-09). Adds the authenticated three-column shell, 16 components (goal-space-list, goal-space-shell, node-board-view, card-lane, card-row, card-detail-drawer, confirmation-queue, execution-status, audit-timeline, theme-switcher, command-palette, command-input, output-feed, left-sidebar, right-sidebar, connection-status-indicator, empty-state), 11 library modules (api/{client,types,goal-spaces,node-boards,cards,confirmations,executions}, realtime/{useSseStream,replay}, theme/{tmTheme,themes}, keyboard/{shortcuts,useShortcut,command-parser}, state/{board-store,ui-store}), 8 component tests, and modifications to apps/web/src/app/{layout,page}.tsx + globals.css. The design follows the codex-cli-inspired three-pane developer-tool aesthetic per the approved plan at /Users/taolu/.claude/plans/zippy-churning-music.md: dark by default with 4 themes, monospace + sans mixed typography, no rounded white cards, 4px colored status dots (no badge pills), motion uses only the 4 established motion tokens, SSE streaming for detail pages, slash-command + output-feed surface (no free-form chat), keyboard-first with Tab queue. Reuses the F2-08 SSE server endpoint, the F2-02..F2-07 REST APIs, the existing design tokens (tokens.css), and the existing font loading in the root layout. No new auth, no new design tokens, no AI chat surface.
acceptance_criteria: GET / redirects to /goal-spaces when authenticated; renders existing landing when unauthenticated.
GET /goal-spaces renders the goal-space-list page inside the three-column shell (280px / 1fr / 360px).
GET /goal-spaces/:id renders the goal-space detail page; opens SSE; replays events on mount.
GET /goal-spaces/:id loading state renders EmptyState kind='loading'; error state renders EmptyState kind='error' with [retry].
The shell CSS grid is 280px / 1fr / 360px; Cmd+B collapses left and Cmd+J collapses right using --motion-move.
GoalSpaceList renders empty / loading / populated states.
NodeBoardView groups cards by state via CardLanes; each lane shows the state's count and a 4px status dot.
CardLane shows '// no cards in <state>' when empty.
CardRow shows card_<id> (mono), status dot, title (sans), assignee chip.
CardDetailDrawer has 3 tabs (OVERVIEW/TRANSITIONS/AUDIT); sticky footer with legal transitions as bordered buttons.
ConfirmationQueue shows approve/reject buttons that disable during in-flight POST (1px underline).
ExecutionStatus shows in-flight AI roles; rows appear/disappear as SSE events arrive.
AuditTimeline shows chronological mono log; filterable by type.
ThemeSwitcher shows 4 themes with preview swatches; persists to localStorage; Cmd+/ cycles.
CommandPalette opens on Cmd+K; arrow keys + Enter to activate.
CommandInput accepts slash commands only; non-/ input rejected with '// unrecognised input. type /help.'
OutputFeed shows last 100 entries with success / error / echo variants.
LeftSidebar shows workspace meta + status bar.
RightSidebar shows ExecutionStatus + AuditTimeline + ThemeSwitcher.
ConnectionStatusIndicator shows colored 6px dot reflecting SSE state (idle/connecting/live/reconnecting/stale/error).
EmptyState is shared by all loading / empty / error states; never a card.
useSseStream opens exactly one EventSource per (goalSpaceId, page) even when multiple components subscribe.
Events are deduped by id (replay + live emits the same id → only one stored).
lastEventId is persisted to localStorage per goal space.
Reconnection uses capped exponential backoff (min(2s * 2^attempts, 30s)).
EVENT_CURSOR_EXPIRED (HTTP 410) on the explicit replay fetch triggers snapshot refetch + SSE restart.
4 themes are selectable: dark-codex (default), dark-solarized, light-paper, dark-monokai.
Theme persists in localStorage and survives reload (no FOUC).
Cmd+K opens palette; Esc closes.
[ / ] navigate goal spaces on list page.
g g (within 500ms) navigates to list.
Enter on selected card row opens detail drawer.
Tab order is DOM-based; no positive tabIndex anywhere.
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test -- src/__tests__/ui/board-render.test.tsx passes (required plan test).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test passes (full UI suite).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web typecheck passes (0 errors).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web lint passes (0 errors).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web format:check passes (clean).
git diff --check passes.
No files outside the F2-09 file set or unrelated prior changes are modified (except the 3 documented modifications to layout.tsx / page.tsx / globals.css).
test_needs: Component tests for every new component
useSseStream hook test (dedup, status, reconnect, EVENT_CURSOR_EXPIRED)
API client test (200 success, error envelope, 410 callback, query serialization)
Keyboard test (chord registration, [ ], g g, Cmd+K)
MSW handlers for all consumed endpoints (recorded fixtures)
Manual smoke test (10 steps per the plan)
Visual checks (no white cards, 4px dots, motion tokens)
pnpm check (typecheck + lint + test + build + format:check)
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
